title: Irlbachia alata

It belongs to the genus Irlbachia, which is a group of flowering plants native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Irlbachia alata places it within the monocot order Asparagales. This classification is based on the plant's anatomical and morphological characteristics. The Amaryllidaceae family is a diverse group of flowering plants, many of which are known for their showy and fragrant flowers.
